subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-28 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: When the Blessed Beauty sojourned in Kurdistan, He caused Aqa Muhammad Karim to send forth his family and dependents, that they should repair unto Baghdad [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که جمال مبارک در کردستان تشریف داشتند آقا محمد کریم فرستاد اهل و عیالش را به بغداد آوردند
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
